subject: [PATCH v5 18/36] mm/gup: disallow longterm pin of private node folios

2026-07-20.patch_summary: This patch prevents long-term pinning of folios on private nodes, which would lead to incorrect behavior in the GUP long-term path. It introduces a new function `folio_longterm_pin_forbidden()` that returns true for any private node folio and uses this function to reject such pins before migration. The gup-fast path is also updated to defer private folios to the slow path via `folio_allows_longterm_pin()`. This change ensures that private node folios are neither pinned nor migrated, preventing potential issues.
